languages.text: "Да, Нунциус, это хорошая гипотеза". {n}Эоганн кивает с сосредоточенным видом.{/n} "Полагаю, тщательное исследование аутопсированного тела и определение родственных связей мертвеца поможет сузить круг подозреваемых и избежать умножения энтропии. Простых проверок может быть недостаточно".

"Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."
languages.original_text: "Да, Нунциус, это хорошая гипотеза". {n}Эоганн кивает с сосредоточенным видом.{/n} "Полагаю, тщательное исследование аутопсированного тела и определение родственных связей мертвеца поможет сузить круг подозреваемых и избежать умножения энтропии. Простых проверок может быть недостаточно".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."

"Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods to his unseen interlocutor with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."

"Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods to his unseen interlocutor with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."

"Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."

languages.text: «Sí, Nuncius, es una hipótesis decente». {n}Eogunn asiente hacia a su interlocutor invisible con mirada decidida.{/n} «Supongo analizar concienzudamente el cadáver tras la autopsia y establecer los lazos familiares del difunto ayudaría a identificar mejor a los sospechosos y reducir la multiplicación entrópica. Una comprobación rutinaria probablemente sea insuficiente».
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods to his unseen interlocutor with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, Nuncius, es una hipótesis decente». {n}Eogunn asiente hacia a su interlocutor invisible con mirada decidida.{/n} Supongo analizar concienzudamente el cadáver tras la autopsia y establecer los lazos familiares del difunto ayudaría a identificar mejor a los sospechosos y reducir la multiplicación entrópica. Una comprobación rutinaria probablemente sea insuficiente».

languages.text: “是的，努恩修斯，这个假设很合理。”{n}伊奥贡专注地点了点头。{/n}“我认为，对解剖尸体进行彻查，并调查死者的亲属关系，这样有助于缩小嫌疑范围，避免无序熵增。光靠初步检查恐怕还不够。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."

traits.locale_text: “是的，努恩修斯，这个假设很合理。”{n}伊奥贡专注地点了点头。{/n}“我认为，对解剖尸体进行彻查，并调查死者的亲属关系，这样有助于缩小嫌疑范围，避免无序熵增。光靠初步检查恐怕还不够。”

languages.text: « Oui, Nuncius, c'est une hypothèse acceptable. {n}songe Eogunn en hochant la tête avec intensité.{/n} Je pense qu'un examen complet du corps autopsié et une enquête sur les liens familiaux du cadavre nous permettraient de réduire la liste des suspects et d'éviter la démultiplication de l'entropie. Les analyses rudimentaires ne suffiront sans doute pas. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, Nuncius, c'est une hypothèse acceptable. {n}songe Eogunn en hochant la tête avec intensité.{/n} Je pense qu'un examen complet du corps autopsié et une enquête sur les liens familiaux du cadavre nous permettraient de réduire la liste des suspects et d'éviter la démultiplication de l'entropie. Les analyses rudimentaires ne suffiront sans doute pas. »

languages.text: "Evet Nuncius, bu makul bir hipotez." {n}Eogunn, dikkatlice bakarak başını sallıyor.{/n} "Otopsisi yapılan bedenin kapsamlı bir şekilde incelenmesi ve ölü adamın aile bağlarının belirlenmesinin şüphelileri daraltmaya ve entropi artışını önlemeye yardımcı olacağını varsayıyorum. Yüzeysel kontroller yeterli olmayabilir."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."

traits.locale_text: "Evet Nuncius, bu makul bir hipotez." {n}Eogunn, dikkatlice bakarak başını sallıyor.{/n} "Otopsisi yapılan bedenin kapsamlı bir şekilde incelenmesi ve ölü adamın aile bağlarının belirlenmesinin şüphelileri daraltmaya ve entropi artışını önlemeye yardımcı olacağını varsayıyorum. Yüzeysel kontroller yeterli olmayabilir."

languages.text: 「そうですね、ヌンキウス、それはなかなかの仮説です」{n}エオガンは真剣な面持ちでうなずいた。{/n}「解剖された遺体を徹底的に調べ、死んだ男の血縁関係を特定すれば、容疑者を絞り込み、エントロピーの増大を避ける助けになるでしょう。初歩的な確認だけでは不十分かもしれません」
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."

traits.locale_text: 「そうですね、ヌンキウス、それはなかなかの仮説です」{n}エオガンは真剣な面持ちでうなずいた。{/n}「解剖された遺体を徹底的に調べ、死んだ男の血縁関係を特定すれば、容疑者を絞り込み、エントロピーの増大を避ける助けになるでしょう。初歩的な確認だけでは不十分かもしれません」

languages.text: "Ja, Nuncius, das ist eine vernünftige Hypothese." {n}Eogunn nickt mit ernster Miene.{/n} "Ich nehme an, eine gründliche Untersuchung der sezierten Leich und die Bestimmung der familiären Bindungen des Mannes würden helfen, den Kreis der Verdächtigen einzugrenzen und eine Entropiemultiplikation zu vermeiden. Eine rudimentäre Überprüfung reicht vermutlich nicht aus."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."
